name: daimon-memory
description: Shared cross-tool memory for Codex, backed by daimon-memory. Recall relevant + recent memory on UserPromptSubmit (hot memory); remember/recall/read MCP tools. Deterministic recall, curated capture.

interface.longDescription: Auto-recalls relevant + recent shared memory into each prompt from daimon-memory (deterministic hybrid keyword+semantic, zero-LLM), and exposes remember/recall/read tools. The same memory backend as the Hermes and Claude Code integrations.
